content: [{"section_id": "s01", "title": "Definitions and Taxonomy of Intermittent Fasting Protocols", "description": "Formal definitions of alternate-day fasting, time-restricted feeding, 5:2, and periodic fasting per Cochrane protocol standards. Establishes nomenclature used throughout the review."}, {"section_id": "s02", "title": "Efficacy of Intermittent Fasting versus Continuous Energy Restriction", "description": "Synthesis of RCT and meta-analytic evidence on weight loss, body composition, and cardiometabolic biomarkers when IF is compared head-to-head with continuous energy restriction under matched-energy-intake conditions."}, {"section_id": "s03", "title": "Safety Signals and Population-Specific Contraindications", "description": "Review of adverse events and populations for which IF is contraindicated or requires monitoring, including pregnancy, lactation, sulfonylurea users, and signals of lean-mass loss."}, {"section_id": "s04", "title": "Methodological Quality and Evidence Certainty", "description": "Assessment of trial heterogeneity, meta-analytic methods, network-meta-analysis design, and the evidence gaps that persist across primary RCTs and systematic reviews."}, {"section_id": "s05", "title": "Implications for Clinical Practice and Future Research", "description": "Translation of evidence into practice recommendations, identification of open questions on long-term outcomes and population subgroups, and priorities for future trials."}]
